items.snippet: The Vanguard FTSE Developed Markets ETF (VEA) gives investors a low-cost way to invest in developed markets outside the U.S. The iShares Core MSCI Emerging Markets ETF (IEMG) provides exposure to emerging markets and leans more toward technology companies. Choosing between the two ETFs will depend on how much country and sector concentration you prefer.
